symbols: flowers held or worn — beauty, transience of youth, and earthly vanity
white flowing dress — outward purity or the appearance of innocence
upswept hair with blossoms — adornment and worldly beauty
description: Six decorative panels arranged in two rows of three, each labeled 'Demi-Vierges.' Each panel shows a slender young woman in a long, flowing white or cream dress, posed in profile or three-quarter view against a brown and pale green background. The women wear their hair up, adorned with large flowers. Some hold flowers or garlands. The figures are elegant and stylized, with delicate, elongated proportions.
